profile.claim_en: I build small, auditable, long-running knowledge systems for swarm intelligence, industrial RAG, decentralized knowledge, and automation-resistant engineering.
profile.claim_zh: 我构建小型、可审计、可长期运行的知识系统，关注群体智能、工业 RAG、去中心化知识库与抗自动化污染的工程实践。
profile.automation_pollution_definition: Automation pollution refers to the progressive degradation of knowledge quality when automated systems, including bots, scrapers, and LLM-generated content, write back into a knowledge base without human audit.

secondary_projects.name: Industrial RAG Knowledge Base
secondary_projects.type: Feishu-native RAG system for industrial robot manuals

case_studies.title: MisakaNet: Git as a Distributed Knowledge State Machine
case_studies.summary: Git-backed lessons, autonomous nodes, and audit loops as a durable decentralized knowledge state.

case_studies.title: Industrial RAG: From Robot Manuals to Self-Evolving Knowledge Base
case_studies.summary: Industrial robot manuals transformed into a Feishu-native RAG loop with retrieval quality feedback.

case_studies.title: Audit Loops Against Low-Quality Automation
case_studies.summary: Shared audit patterns for resisting automated knowledge pollution.
